sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Everything you need to know about StreamBits

questions.question: What is IPTV?
questions.answer: IPTV (Internet Protocol Television) delivers TV over the internet. You get live channels, catch-up TV, and on-demand content on Smart TV, phone, tablet, or computer—often in HD and 4K—without cable or satellite.

questions.question: How fast is activation?
questions.answer: Most accounts are activated within minutes. After payment, you'll receive your login details and can start streaming right away.

questions.question: What devices can I use?
questions.answer: StreamBits works on Smart TVs (Samsung, LG, Android TV, Apple TV), Fire Stick, Android and iOS phones and tablets, and any modern web browser.

questions.question: Do you offer a free trial?
questions.answer: We offer risk-free satisfaction. Check our pricing page for current trial or money-back options.

sections.title: Start Streaming Today
